ref: But if you reject me, I will tell my Father in heaven you don't belong to me. Not Peace, but Trouble (Luke
text: Ama, sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i keteeri minɛm nyunu ka i ti má m susu­fɔ, mini gusu bá kete m Si Nyɛmɛ bo i wo aŋgoro n nyunu ka i mi ti má m dɛɛ.” Kabo Yesu ŋa wɔ fa kpakpaaki­nu aba barasu ni
translated: But, if you do not believe that I am the one, you will die in your sins, and you will not be able to go where I am going.” After Jesus said these words to the people

ref: Jesus answered, “The Scriptures also say, ‘Don't try to test the Lord your God!’ ”
text: Na Yesu ase i ka, “Ba kaaki akɛrɛ i Nyɛmɛ Jɔrɛ Kadasi n nu bekun ka, ‘Má a yo Micɛra Nyɛmɛ n na a niɛ kabo i yiko ti barasu.’”
translated: When Jesus saw this, he said, "Go and tell that fox, 'I will continue to heal people and do miracles today and tomorrow, and on the third day I will finish my work.'"

ref: But you let people get by without helping their parents when they should. You let them say that what they have has been offered to God.
text: Ama, ambɛrɛ kere ka nzɛn sɔnɔ be la deke be bo i ti ye ni ka i fa buka i si, ni i ni, i koro se bu ka, ‘Deke bo má m ŋa m fa ma am ni, ma fa ayi saraka ama Nyɛmɛ.’
translated: If a person is very sick and is about to die, and you want to help him, you should say, 'Let this person not die, let him live so that he can perform the sacrifice for God.'

ref: Look at the birds in the sky! They don't plant or harvest. They don't even store grain in barns. Yet your Father in heaven takes care of them. Aren't you worth much more than birds?
text: Am niɛ anumam, haari ni bo bu dɔ má ni, na bu kaaki kpiɛ má ni, bu tambu gɔ má bondo nu gusu, se am Si Nyɛmɛ ma bu diire ye bu di a. Ambɛrɛ la anyunuyi tara anumam, má sɔ?
translated: If I were to die, it should not be because of hunger, nor should it be because of thirst, but it should be because of the love I have for my people, so that my God will not say I did not try. Is this not the suffering we are going through, my friend?

ref: How can anyone break into the house of a strong man and steal his things, unless he first ties up the strong man? Then he can take everything.
text: Be koro wura má sɔnɔ faŋga­fɔ dika na i fin i neŋge, má ka wɔ tara i faŋga acin i nyama ka, ye i nya koro fin i neŋge n bo i wo awuru n nu a.”
translated: If you want to sell your child to a stranger, you don't just sell the child without informing the family, you first inform the family so they can come and see.
